summary: Documentation build failed because a Python import raised a SyntaxError due to an unresolved merge conflict marker in the source, which broke autodoc and conversion of llama.md to MDX.
root_cause: An unresolved git merge conflict marker ('<<<<<<< sonic-moe') is present in transformers/modeling_utils.py (line 1974), causing a Python SyntaxError during import and aborting the doc build.

evidence.reason: Shows the exact file and line where Python encountered the problem.
This is a git merge conflict marker present in the source file; such markers cause invalid Python syntax.
Confirms Python raised a syntax error when importing the module containing the conflict marker.

evidence.quote: There was an error when converting ../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md to the MDX format.
evidence.reason: Shows the doc build failed while converting llama.md as a direct consequence of the import/syntax error.

suggested_fix: Open transformers/modeling_utils.py, remove or resolve the merge conflict markers (e.g. the '<<<<<<< sonic-moe' block) and commit the resolved file, then re-run the documentation build. Ensure no other files contain leftover conflict markers before rebuilding.
